tasks.title: Fix #166: Act phase silently skipped (lane-plan not found, no error thrown)
Fix #161: skeleton_creator.py generates function names with hyphens (invalid Python)
Fix #163: Lane plan assigns same impl file to multiple lanes (RED/GREEN conflicts)
Fix #160: skeleton_creator.py overwrites test file on each lane instead of appending
Fix #165: datum-go uses relative scriptPath — breaks when CWD is not repo root
Fix #158/#162: test-count gate misses class-based tests (grep only matches def test_)
Fix #159: lane plan generates file_conflict_with but adds no dependency edges

primary_defect: CORR-001/CORR-002 (critical): RED test skeletons for AC1-AC5 are entirely absent from both test_ruff_precheck.py and test_mypy_precheck.py despite preflight recording skeleton_written=True for all 6 ACs. The act phase did not run.
notes: closeout-data.json synthesized from TICKET.md and REVIEW-REPORT.md. Act phase did not execute — all 7 tasks remain queued. Review identified 10 findings (2 critical) across skeleton generation and traceability comment hygiene.
